case_title: CHRISTINA BALISTRERI et al VS. GINO MORENA ENTERPRISES OF THE NORTHWEST LLC

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,752.34 FILED BY BALISTRERI, CHRISTINA NIVALA, MARY A. AS TO DEFENDANT GINO MORENA ENTERPRISES OF THE NORTHWEST LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-26-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-26-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-26-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY JAN VAN DEVERE--PROPERTY MANAGER.NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-26-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-26-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY JAN VAN DEVERE--PROPERTY MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-26-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BALISTRERI, CHRISTINA NIVALA, MARY A. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GINO MORENA ENTERPRISES OF THE NORTHWEST LLC STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-26-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT GINO MORENA ENTERPRISES OF THE NORTHWEST LLC RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT BALISTRERI, CHRISTINA NIVALA, MARY A. $795.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $845.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT "UNCLAIMED" COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT BALISTRERI, CHRISTINA
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT BALISTRERI, CHRISTINA NIVALA, MARY A.
